dense_only.description: Baseline Ragas run generated through RagService dense ChromaDB retrieval, top-5 contexts.

hybrid_only.description: Hybrid retrieval without reranker: dense + BM25 sparse retrieval, alpha=0.5, top-5 contexts.

hybrid_reranker.description: Hybrid retrieval top-20 candidates followed by BAAI/bge-reranker-base cross-encoder reranking to final top-5 contexts.

batch_evaluation.reason: SenseNova + Ragas faithfulness/context_precision can exceed per-sample timeout on standards-heavy table or metadata chunks, so metrics were evaluated in 50-sample batches and merged by averaging the two batch means.

interpretation.dense_to_hybrid: Hybrid retrieval validates the v1.2 retrieval optimization: all four Ragas metrics improve sharply over dense-only, especially context_recall and context_precision.
interpretation.hybrid_to_reranker: Reranker keeps the same source-level hit ratio as hybrid-only but substantially improves context_precision and context_recall. Faithfulness is nearly tied and slightly lower because reranking changes/narrows top-5 context and leads to longer, more specific answers with more claims for Ragas to verify.
